title: 403 - The user is unauthorized to use the api_v2
excerpt:
I have 2 accounts. 
1 account is the ‘team lead’ and has access to the APIv2 
My second account which acts as a ‘team member’ (and registered as a developer) is unable to access the api_v2. 
Im using the SDK v0.1.1. 
The…

posts.author: matthewlockyer (Matthew Lockyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have 2 accounts.

1 account is the ‘team lead’ and has access to the APIv2
My second account which acts as a ‘team member’ (and registered as a developer) is unable to access the api_v2.

Im using the SDK v0.1.1.

The error is thrown both in the app widget (via the SDK) and in the API playground.

Any ideas? All OAUTH settings are enabled.

posts.author: matthewlockyer (Matthew Lockyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Obviously I’d solve it straight away. The user was a viewer.

I changed them to a member and it worked:

Here: https://*.monday.com/admin/my-team/my-team#all_with_pending.compact

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml: Glad you were able to get it solved Matthew! And welcome to the community Happy building.
